about.title: About Us
about.description: We are a dental clinic focused on prevention, timely diagnosis, and personalized treatment plans for each patient.
about.storyText:
At Yactayo Cama Dental Clinic, we believe a healthy smile improves quality of life. We were founded to provide dental care that is clear, human-centered, and clinically solid for every life stage.
Our team combines clinical experience and digital technology to achieve precise diagnosis and more comfortable treatments. We explain every option in simple terms so you can make confident decisions.
We focus on prevention, rehabilitation, and dental aesthetics through personalized plans that prioritize your long-term oral health.
More than a visit, we aim to build lasting trust with every patient and family.
about.staffDescription: A multidisciplinary team for consultations, restorative treatment, and ongoing follow-up.
about.reviewsDescription: A few experiences shared by patients who trust us.

contact.title: Contact and Bookings
contact.description: You can message us on WhatsApp, call us, or leave your details to schedule an appointment.
contact.faqDescription: Quick answers so you can schedule with more clarity.
contact.referenceNote: Contact-first layout for dental clinics: immediate WhatsApp CTA, visible schedule, and map-based location.

whatsapp.title: Immediate assistance
whatsapp.text: Priority channel for bookings and quick questions during business hours.

footer.title: Yactayo Cama
footer.description: Trusted dental clinic with comprehensive care for children, teens, and adults.

highlights.responsive: Support before and after every appointment

generalConsultation.title: General Dental Evaluation
generalConsultation.description: Comprehensive consultation to detect early risks and define an oral health plan.
generalConsultation.point1: Clinical review of gums, teeth, and bite
generalConsultation.point2: Detection of caries, inflammation, and wear
generalConsultation.point3: Preventive plan and oral hygiene guidance

cardiologyConsultation.title: Restorative Dentistry
cardiologyConsultation.description: Treatments to recover function and aesthetics in damaged teeth.
cardiologyConsultation.point1: Aesthetic fillings for cavities and minor fractures
cardiologyConsultation.point3: Occlusal adjustment for more comfortable chewing

traumatologyConsultation.title: Endodontics
traumatologyConsultation.description: Root canal treatment to control pain, remove infection, and preserve the tooth.
traumatologyConsultation.point2: Canal cleaning and sealing with modern techniques

dermatologyConsultation.title: Periodontics
dermatologyConsultation.description: Specialized care for gum inflammation, bleeding, and periodontal disease.
dermatologyConsultation.point2: Deep cleaning and subgingival plaque control

ophthalmologyConsultation.title: Pediatric Dentistry
ophthalmologyConsultation.description: Dental care for children with preventive education and minimally invasive treatments.
ophthalmologyConsultation.point2: Sealants and fluoride for enamel protection
ophthalmologyConsultation.point3: Guidance for parents on hygiene and nutrition habits

abdominalUltrasound.title: Digital Diagnostics
abdominalUltrasound.description: Imaging technology to evaluate your case precisely before treatment.
abdominalUltrasound.point1: Panoramic and periapical radiography as needed

preventiveConsultation.title: Preventive Consultation
preventiveConsultation.description: General evaluation to identify early risks and keep your smile healthy.

vaccinationAndDeworming.title: Dental Cleaning
vaccinationAndDeworming.description: Professional prophylaxis to remove plaque and tartar and prevent periodontal disease.

clinicalLab.title: Imaging Diagnostics
clinicalLab.description: Dental radiographs and clinical records for more accurate clinical decisions.

surgeryAndHospitalization.title: Rehabilitation and Oral Surgery
surgeryAndHospitalization.description: Safe procedures to restore function, comfort, and aesthetics.

groomingAndPetshop.title: Dental Aesthetics
groomingAndPetshop.description: Whitening and smile harmonization with a conservative approach.

humanCare.title: Personalized Care
humanCare.description: We listen carefully, explain options in plain language, and define a realistic plan for each patient.

medicalCriteria.title: Clinical Criteria
medicalCriteria.description: We apply updated protocols and evidence-based dentistry for timely and precise decisions.

continuousFollowup.title: Continuous Follow-up
continuousFollowup.description: Care does not end after the appointment. We monitor progress and reinforce habits for long-term results.

firstVisit.question: What should I bring to the first appointment?
firstVisit.answer: Bring previous exams if available and a short summary of symptoms or past dental treatments.

vaccines.question: How often should I get a dental cleaning?
vaccines.answer: Usually every 6 months, but it depends on your oral health and habits. We assess this during your consultation.

emergency.question: Do you provide dental emergency care?
emergency.answer: Yes. We provide first-response care for acute pain, inflammation, or dental fractures. Message us on WhatsApp.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept cash, bank transfers, and digital payment methods.
